title: cortex.audit.graph.<verb>.v1 data payload
description: Stub schema for cortex-graph (LangGraph sidecar) audit events covering node lifecycle, human_review interrupts, and resume decisions. Field surface is TBD-strict — subject + timestamp are the only required keys so CORTEX_REQUIRE_ENVELOPE=1 has a target to validate against. Tighten before enforcing strict mode in production.
